sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17531" key="au)/sios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὔσιος</orth>, <sense id="n17531.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τηΰσιος</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ibyc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">αὔτως.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
